name: Shanxi Guoxin Energy Corporation Limited
summary: Shanxi Guoxin Energy Corporation Limited engages in the energy management business. The company's products primarily include natural gas, coal bed methane, and coal gas. It also provides energy sector related consulting services. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Lianhua Synthetic Fiber Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanxi Guoxin Energy Corporation Limited in July 2014. The company was incorporated in 1992 and is based in Taiyuan, China.
